positive.prompt: Style this form component with responsive Tailwind CSS v4 grid and flex utilities
How do I configure a custom theme extend in Tailwind v4?
Build a responsive mobile-first navigation bar using Tailwind CSS classes

negative.prompt: Create CSS variables and design principles for typography
Audit the WCAG accessibility and screen reader support of a navbar

evals.prompt: Build a responsive three-column grid layout with mobile-first breakpoints using Tailwind CSS classes.
evals.expected_output: Grid columns are styled responsive layout matches on mobile and desktops.
expectations: Grid layout uses responsive breakpoints (sm:, md:, lg:)
Mobile-first grid columns (grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3) are applied
Consistent padding and gap utilities are used
Layout renders correctly on mobile and desktop viewports
